query:
-- Find the most common billing month (ignoring bad dates like 46080)
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(invoiceDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%b %Y') as period,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM billing_items
WHERE invoiceDate REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$'
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 5;
